testcase.name: test_nyaa_last_uploads
testcase.failure:
def test_nyaa_last_uploads(): > request = Nyaa.last_uploads(number_of_results=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/integration/test_nyaasi.py:6: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <class 'nyaapy.nyaasi.nyaa.Nyaa'>, number_of_results = 10
@classmethod def last_uploads(self, number_of_results: int): r = treq.get(self.URL)
# If anything up with nyaa servers let the user know. > r.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
nyaapy/anime_site.py:15: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_nyaa_search
testcase.failure:
def test_nyaa_search(): > request = Nyaa.search(keyword="koe no katachi") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/integration/test_nyaasi.py:14: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <class 'nyaapy.nyaasi.nyaa.Nyaa'>, keyword = 'koe no katachi' kwargs = {}, base_url = 'https://nyaa.si', user = None, category = 0 subcategory = 0, filters = 0, page = 0, sorting = 'id'
@classmethod def search(self, keyword: str, **kwargs): base_url = self.URL
user = kwargs.get("user", None) category = kwargs.get("category", 0) subcategory = kwargs.get("subcategory", 0) filters = kwargs.get("filters", 0) page = kwargs.get("page", 0) sorting = kwargs.get( "sort", "id" ) # Sorting by id = sorting by date, this is the default. order = kwargs.get("order", "desc")
user_uri = f"user/{user}" if user else ""
if page > 0: search_uri = "{}/{}?f={}&c={}_{}&q={}&p={}&s={}&o={}".format( base_url, user_uri, filters, category, subcategory, keyword, page, sorting, order, ) else: search_uri = "{}/{}?f={}&c={}_{}&q={}&s={}&o={}".format( base_url, user_uri, filters, category, subcategory, keyword, sorting, order, )
if not user: search_uri += "&page=rss"
http_response = treq.get(search_uri) > http_response.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
nyaapy/anime_site.py:67: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_nyaa_get_single
testcase.failure:
def test_nyaa_get_single(): > request = Nyaa.get(view_id="1847113") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/integration/test_nyaasi.py:21: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <class 'nyaapy.nyaasi.nyaa.Nyaa'>, view_id = '1847113'
@classmethod def get(self, view_id: int): r = treq.get(f"{self.URL}/view/{view_id}") > r.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
nyaapy/anime_site.py:84: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_nyaa_get_from_user
testcase.failure:
def test_nyaa_get_from_user(): > request = Nyaa.get_from_user(username="Erai-raws") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/integration/test_nyaasi.py:27: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <class 'nyaapy.nyaasi.nyaa.Nyaa'>, username = 'Erai-raws'
@classmethod def get_from_user(self, username): r = treq.get(f"{self.URL}/user/{username}") > r.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
nyaapy/anime_site.py:93: AttributeError
